plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data AI Search Azure OpenAI ts Local Debug

steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option from the dropdown menu in the "New Project" window.
Click the "General Teams Agent" dropdown option in the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" menu.
Click the "Azure AI Search" option in the "Select an option to load your data" dropdown within the "Teams Agent with Data" window of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu in Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Default folder" dropdown in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select the directory for the project location (`/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects`).
Click the "env" folder in the Explorer sidebar of Visual Studio Code to expand or select it.
Click the ".env.local.user" file in the "env" folder in the Explorer sidebar of Visual Studio Code to select or open the file.
Click on the ".env.playground.user" file in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to select or open it.
